inputs.label: Pressure Reading (Pa)
inputs.businessContext: Actual pressure reading from sensor in pascals.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual pressure reading from sensor in pascals.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sensörden paskal cinsinden gerçek basınç okuması.
businessContext_i18n.de: Tatsächlicher Druckmesswert vom Sensor in Pascal.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Lecture de pression réelle du capteur en pascals.
businessContext_i18n.es: Lectura de presión real del sensor en pascales.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Sensör kalibrasyonu için çarpan, tipik olarak 0,95-1,05.
businessContext_i18n.es: Multiplicador para calibración del sensor, típicamente 0.95-1.05.

inputs.label: Sensor Full Scale (Pa)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum pressure rating of the sensor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum pressure rating of the sensor.
businessContext_i18n.es: Clasificación máxima de presión del sensor.

inputs.label: Sensor Accuracy Class
inputs.businessContext: Accuracy as a percentage of full scale (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5% FS).

businessContext_i18n.en: Accuracy as a percentage of full scale (e.g., 0.5 for 0.5% FS).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tam ölçeğin yüzdesi olarak doğruluk (örn. %0,5 FS için 0,5).
businessContext_i18n.de: Genauigkeit als Prozentsatz des Endwerts (z. B. 0,5 für 0,5 % FS).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Précision en pourcentage de la pleine échelle (ex. 0,5 pour 0,5 % FS).
businessContext_i18n.es: Precisión como porcentaje del fondo de escala (ej., 0.5 para 0.5% FS).

inputs.label: Output Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal digits for psi output; must be integer >=0.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal digits for psi output; must be integer >=0.
businessContext_i18n.tr: psi çıktısı için ondalık basamak sayısı; tamsayı >=0 olmalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für psi-Ausgabe; muss ganze Zahl >=0 sein.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour la sortie en psi ; doit être un entier >= 0.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de dígitos decimales para la salida en psi; debe ser entero >=0.
